ResourceHeader.Description: PADRE MeDDEA Level0 Photon FITS data are uncalibrated hard X-ray event data obtained by the Measuring Directivity to Determine Electron Anisotropy (MeDDEA) instrument on the Solar Polarization and Directivity X-Ray Experiment (PADRE) CubeSat observatory. The Level0 photon files contain the same photon event data as the raw MeDDEA binary data, but converted to FITS format for more convenient analysis. Each raw photon data file generates a single Level0 photon FITS file. The photon product is an on-demand X-ray photon list that is generally available during large flares and calibration periods. Level0 photon files contain event data from detector triggers, including packet-level timing information and science event information such as detector identifier, channel, clock value, and uncalibrated event energy in ADC counts. These data support investigations of the directivity of solar flare hard X-ray emission and the angular distribution of flare-accelerated electrons.

PublicationInfo.Authors: The PADRE MeDDEA Team: NASA Goddard Space Flight Center (USA); Space Sciences Laboratory, University of California Berkeley (USA); Southwest Research Institute (USA); University of Applied Sciences and Arts Northwestern Switzerland (Switzerland); CEA-Saclay (France)
PublicationInfo.PublishedBy: NASA Goddard Space Flight Center, Solar Data Analysis Center (SDAC)

InformationURL.Name: PADRE MeDDEA Data Documentation
InformationURL.Description: Documentation describing MeDDEA data products, data levels, file naming conventions, and reading software.

InformationURL.Name: PADRE MeDDEA Level 0 Data Documentation
InformationURL.Description: Documentation describing the organization of PADRE MeDDEA Level 0 FITS files, including photon, spectrum, and housekeeping files.

Rights.Note: CC0 1.0 Universal is the Creative Commons license applicable to all publicly available NASA Heliophysics data products.

AccessURL.Name: NASA/GSFC/SDAC PADRE MeDDEA Level 0 Photon FITS
AccessURL.Description: Directory listing for PADRE MeDDEA Level 0 photon FITS data at NASA/GSFC/SDAC.
